title: Techno-Quizzo
subtitle: Exploring innovation through engaging quiz challenges. Raising awareness about modern gadgets and technologies. Making learning fun, interactive, and informative.
description:
Title of the event: Techno-Quizzo 
 Objective: The objective of this event was to make them aware of various new gadgets in the market that use novel technologies. Quiz competitions are always interesting and informative, which provide excitement among the students. The main objective of this event was to make them aware of various new gadgets in the market that use novel technologies.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Online quiz conducted via Typeform platform.
Promoted awareness of latest technological trends.
Focus on modern gadgets and emerging technologies.
